author: mark
text:
Auto-derive minor/major bumps from [minor]/[major] markers

release-plz defaulted v0.4.0 to a patch bump (0.3.12) because source commits use this project's bracketed [bl-xxxx] convention rather than Conventional Commits' feat:/fix:/ prefixes. The minor bump was applied by hand via gh api PATCH on the Release PR — workable but error-prone.

Configure release-plz's custom_minor_increment_regex / custom_major_increment_regex so a bracketed [minor] or [major] marker anywhere in any commit message in the release window drives the bump. The markers compose with [bl-xxxx] (subject or body both work, since release-plz matches the full message for non-conventional commits), and the absent-marker default is patch. Document the workflow in README's Releasing section.
